options.title: Organize Your Tasks
options.description: Choose how you'd like to organize your Donetick tasks in Home Assistant

data.show_due_in: Days ahead to show upcoming tasks
data.create_assignee_lists: Create individual task lists per person
data.create_date_filtered_lists: Create date-filtered sub-lists (Past Due, Due Today, Upcoming)
data.create_time_of_day_lists: Create time-of-day sub-lists (Morning, Afternoon, Evening, All Day)
data.upcoming_days: Only show upcoming tasks within this many days (1-365)
data.include_unassigned_in_assignee_lists: Include unassigned tasks in assignee lists
data.auto_complete_past_due_recurrent: Auto-complete past due recurring tasks at midnight
data.notify_on_past_due: Send notifications when tasks become past due
